dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: The Experimental shell composition root, immutable settings/theme projection, and panel window host directly use system Qt Core and GUI, while the launcher controller and launcher, task, and notification presentation adapters use Qt Core. The maintainer-selected Qt 6.11 floor is verified by the Gentoo 6.11.1 reference environment.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The Experimental shell executable and panel, launcher, and notification modules directly use system QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls. The maintainer-selected Qt 6.11 floor is verified by the Gentoo qtdeclarative 6.11.1-r1 reference environment.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.reason: The shell's strict complete-snapshot parser includes the system nlohmann JSON header and recompiles canonical typed state; it is not an installed runtime library.

dependencies.name: basu
dependencies.fallback: Ubuntu and compatible hosts may use the selected API-compatible libsystemd sd-bus provider; one build links exactly one provider.
dependencies.reason: The event-driven shell settings client directly uses Prismdrake's selected sd-bus provider for the Experimental complete-snapshot contract.

dependencies.name: dbus
dependencies.reason: The shell consumes settings over the user session message bus; isolated tests use dbus-run-session while project code links the selected sd-bus provider rather than libdbus.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The Experimental Qt panel host and event-driven task controller consume the internal standards-only X11 adapter, which links system libxcb for dedicated event connections, RandR topology, EWMH task observation, and checked dock and window-manager requests. The installed shell executable resolves libxcb and libxcb-randr in the Gentoo reference lifecycle.

unresolved.reason: The installed Gentoo runtime and AT-SPI behavior are measured for the exact reference package, but supported minimum basu, D-Bus, and XCB versions remain unmeasured.
